privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset contains real household survey data from Principles of Econometrics, 5th Edition by Hill, Griffiths, and Lim. It comprises 40 observations with two variables: food_exp (weekly food expenditure in dollars, range $109.71-$587.66) and income (weekly income in $100 units, range $3.69-$33.40). The variables show a positive correlation (r=0.620485), indicating that higher household income is associated with greater food expenditure. The data is authentic household survey data, not synthetic.
